meaning: adj.容易的,安逸的,舒适的,宽裕的,小康的,从容的,宽容的,流畅的adv.不费力的,轻松,悠闲,慢慢地n.短暂的休息
examples: The shower is easy to install.
The problem is anything but easy.
Divorce is never easy for children.
Been walking my mind to an easy time, my back turned towards the sun.
Boston is a compact city, which makes it easy to get around on foot.
